Description: The Grand Mosque in Makkah with the Kaaba surrounded by pilgrims under a clear blue sky; I chose it because visiting for Umrah or Hajj is one of my biggest spiritual dreams.
The Eiffel Tower in Paris on a bright day, shot from below against a blue sky; I chose it because I dream of experiencing the city’s art, culture, and night views from the tower.
The Dome of the Rock in the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound at golden hour; I chose it because it is a deeply important Islamic and historical site that I hope to visit one day.
The ancient rock-carved facade of Petra in warm sunset light; I chose it because its history and desert scenery make it one of the most fascinating places in the world.
Overwater villas and turquoise sea in the Maldives under a bright tropical sky; I chose it because it looks like the perfect place to relax by the ocean and enjoy clear water.
Snow-covered peaks of the Himalaya Mountains rising above the clouds; I chose it because I would love to see these dramatic high mountains and feel the fresh cold air.
A lone hiker in a red jacket walking through deep snow between tall pine trees; I chose it because I like the idea of a quiet winter adventure in a remote snowy landscape.
The Burj Khalifa and surrounding skyscrapers reflected in turquoise water in downtown Dubai; I chose it because I want to see this record-breaking tower and the futuristic city skyline.
Cappadocia’s valleys filled with hot-air balloons floating above unusual rock formations; I chose it because the sunrise balloon ride over this landscape looks like a once-in-a-lifetime experience.
Plitvice Lakes National Park with turquoise lakes, waterfalls, and green forest; I chose it because the wooden trails and clear water make it an ideal place for peaceful nature walks.
